description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/oer/docker/debian-emacs-tex-org:v1.0. Define a single deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script, execute git submodule sync --recursive and git submodule update --init --recursive. Then run emacs --batch --load elisp/publish.el --funcall org-publish-all. Publish the generated public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in 4 weeks.
